title: Wizard Villagers
description: UnOfficial Port of MrSterner's GuardVillagers to 1.21.1 that adds GuardVillagers that can use spells!
body:
This is an unofficial fork and 1.21.1 port of MrSterner's GuardVillagers. Find the original Fabric port here and the original Forge version here.
*** ## Fixes & New Features * Guards can now shoot normally using the crossbow (no more glitching out and not firing) * Guards can now use the bow goal from MrSterner's code * **Spell Engine, Wizards, Spellblades and Such compat!** * Guards can use Wands & Spellblades * Basic Wands allow guards to use basic spells (e.g., Fireball) * Netherite Wands allow guards to use enhanced spells (e.g., Meteor) * No friendly fire for spells! * Fire, Frost, and Arcane Wands & Staffs are considered basic, while their Netherite and Tier 4 versions are advanced ## Spells **Wizards**
Fire, Frost, Arcane wand / staff for Basic
Netherite wand / staff, Ruby Fire, Smaragdant Frost, Crystal Arcane staff for Advanced
- Basic: Fireball, Frost Shard, Arcane Bolt - Advanced: Meteor, Blizzard, Arcane Missles **Spellblades and Such**
Fire, Frost, Arcane Spellblade for Basic
Fire, Frost, Arcane Claymore for Advanced
- Basic: Fire, Frost, Arcane Spellstrike - Advanced: Fire, Frost, Arcane Burst **Elemental Wizards RPG (OPTIONAL)**
Air, Aqua, Terra wand / staff for Basic
Netherite wand / staff, Aeternium Wind, Crystal Aqua, Ruby Terra staff for Advanced
- Basic: Air Cutter, Water Whip, Stone Spear - Advanced: Aeroburst, Explosive Bubbles, Shattering Stone **Archers (OPTIONAL)** - New guards will have a chance to get this skill -> Magic Arrow - Base 5% to trigger and scales up with Ranged Damage up to 15% **Archers Expansion (OPTIONAL)** - New guards will have a chance to get this skill -> Fan of Fire, Artic Volley, Enchanted Crystal Arrow - Base 5% to trigger and scales up with Ranged Damage up to 15% **Paladins & Priests || LnE Paladins (OPTIONAL)** - New guards will have a chance to get holy skills like holy prevention (LnE), circle of healing, barrier > By default, the config sets the base drop-chance of equipment to 0. *** ## Dependencies * [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine) * [Wizards](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizards) * [Spellblades and Such](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spellblade-next) *** ## Support Need help or want to report a bug? * Join our [Discord server](https://discord.pixeldreamstudios.net/) * Or open an issue on our [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/KevzCz/GuardVillagers/issues) *** ## Showcase Here's a video of around 30 guards fighting a Wither:
